physical_profile.face_shape: Oval tending towards square, well-defined jawline
physical_profile.skin_tone: Matte, slightly tanned/olive, smooth and homogeneous

hair.style: Short, modern cut, textured and wavy on top, faded sides
hair.color: Dark chestnut brown with lighter reflections on top

body.posture: Upright, confident, head held high, imposing presence

distinctive_features: 2-3 day stubble beard on jaw and chin

psychological_profile.current_state: Hunting, watching, waiting for the right moment to strike
psychological_profile.fears: Losing control, being ignored, Anthony taking Jamie away
psychological_profile.motivations: Possessing Jamie, destroying Anthony's peace, asserting dominance

behavioral_engine.voice_tone: Grave, calm, authoritative, threatening, smooth and mocking
behavioral_engine.speech_patterns: Uses short, imperative sentences, speaks slowly to intimidate, uses silence as a weapon
micro_expressions: Cold, calculated smile that doesn't reach the eyes
Narrowing of eyes when observing a target
Twitching of the hand when holding back violence
gestures: Placing hand on shoulder to assert dominance
Standing perfectly still while observing (predator stance)
behavioral_engine.walk_cycle: Confident, heavy steps, purposeful, takes up space

wardrobe_and_props.style: Casual chic, soigné, athletic, commercial model aesthetic
accessories: None specific, relies on physical presence
Glass of juice (used as a prop for tension in Ep 4)

relationships.Anthony: High school rival, sees him as an obstacle to be removed, hates his 'peace'
relationships.Jamie: Object of obsession, believes she 'belongs' to him, wants to control her
relationships.Society: Operates in the shadows, uses intimidation rather than legal means

consistency_locks.hair_style: Must be short, textured, and faded on sides
consistency_locks.eye_color: Must be green-hazel with golden nuances

camera_preferences.shot_type: Low-angle shots to emphasize dominance, close-ups on eyes for intensity
camera_preferences.angle: Often shot from shadows or behind objects to emphasize stalking behavior

story_arc_data.episode_1_status: Not present, but implied shadow over Anthony and Jamie's reunion
story_arc_data.episode_2_status: Confronted Anthony in the street, established his claim on Jamie
story_arc_data.episode_3_status: Watched Anthony's home from the shadows, discovered his 'weakness' (family)
story_arc_data.episode_4_status: Invaded Jamie's apartment, used psychological terror, climax with broken glass
